title: Epigram On The Feuds About Handel And Bononcini.
content:
Strange! all this difference should be
    'Twixt Tweedle-dum and Tweedle-dee!
meaning:
Alexander Pope's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epigram On The Feuds About Handel And Bononcini."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
